name: Exsto Cura — SmartPM Market Intelligence & Outreach Agent

nodes.name: Trigger — Every Monday 6am
nodes.notes: Runs weekly — generates fresh prospect intelligence and outreach drafts every Monday before your BD digest

parameters.jsCode:
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXSTO CURA — SMARTPM PROSPECT DATABASE
// Edit this list as you qualify/disqualify targets
// Signal codes: LOSS=financial loss documented, DELAY=project delay public, LIEN=lien filed, BOND=surety claim
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const prospects = [

  // ── SEGMENT 1: MID-SIZE GCs — REGIONAL HEAVY CIVIL ──────────────────────
  {
    company: 'Barnard Construction Company',
    segment: 'Mid-Size GC',
    vertical: 'Heavy Civil / Infrastructure',
    revenue_est: '$500M-$800M',
    hq: 'Bozeman, MT',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Pipeline and transmission corridor projects with documented schedule pressure. Not ENR Top 50.',
    project_range: '$100-300M',
    contact_title: 'VP of Operations / Project Controls Manager',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'MEDIUM',
    search_keywords: ['Barnard Construction schedule delay', 'Barnard Construction project controls', 'Barnard Construction claim'],
    outreach_angle: 'Heavy civil corridor experience maps directly to their pipeline/transmission work. BIR on next bid package.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Granite Telecommunications / Granite Construction (mid-tier ops)',
    segment: 'Mid-Size GC',
    vertical: 'Heavy Civil / Highway',
    revenue_est: '$300-600M ops division',
    hq: 'Watsonville, CA',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'LOSS',
    signal_detail: 'Public company — SEC filings show project write-downs on fixed-price highway contracts 2023-2024.',
    project_range: '$150-300M',
    contact_title: 'Director of Project Controls',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Granite Construction project loss 2024', 'Granite Construction schedule claim', 'Granite Construction 10-K overrun'],
    outreach_angle: 'SEC-documented project losses. SmartPM monitoring prevents recurrence. BIR on active bids.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Primoris Services Corporation — Utilities Division',
    segment: 'Mid-Size GC',
    vertical: 'Utilities / Pipeline / Power',
    revenue_est: '$800M-$1.2B (utilities segment)',
    hq: 'Dallas, TX',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'LOSS',
    signal_detail: 'Public company. Utilities segment has shown margin compression on fixed-price contracts. Not vertically integrated on controls side.',
    project_range: '$100-250M',
    contact_title: 'VP Project Controls / Scheduling Manager',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Primoris Services project loss utilities', 'Primoris schedule delay claim', 'Primoris 10-K cost overrun'],
    outreach_angle: 'Texas-based — local relationship angle. Utilities/power corridor overlap with CHPE experience.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Wanzek Construction',
    segment: 'Mid-Size GC',
    vertical: 'Energy / Industrial / Wind',
    revenue_est: '$400-700M',
    hq: 'Fargo, ND',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Wind and industrial construction. Complex multi-prime interfaces. Known for schedule pressure on renewable energy projects.',
    project_range: '$100-300M',
    contact_title: 'Director of Planning and Scheduling',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'MEDIUM',
    search_keywords: ['Wanzek Construction schedule delay', 'Wanzek wind project controls', 'Wanzek Construction claim'],
    outreach_angle: 'Renewable energy + HVDC transmission intersection. ALICE simulation angle on pre-construction.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Cianbro Corporation',
    segment: 'Mid-Size GC',
    vertical: 'Industrial / Marine / Energy',
    revenue_est: '$600M-$900M',
    hq: 'Pittsfield, ME',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Complex industrial and marine projects in Northeast. Known schedule complexity on multi-discipline projects.',
    project_range: '$100-300M',
    contact_title: 'VP Engineering and Planning',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Cianbro Corporation project delay', 'Cianbro schedule claim', 'Cianbro project controls'],
    outreach_angle: 'Northeast corridor — geographic overlap with CHPE/TDI territory. Marine and industrial scope experience.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Dunn Construction Co',
    segment: 'Mid-Size GC',
    vertical: 'Heavy Civil / Highways',
    revenue_est: '$200-400M',
    hq: 'Birmingham, AL',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'LOSS',
    signal_detail: 'Regional heavy civil. Fixed-price highway and bridge projects with documented completion delays on state DOT contracts.',
    project_range: '$100-200M',
    contact_title: 'Project Manager / Scheduling Lead',
    smartpm_fit: 'MEDIUM',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Dunn Construction Alabama delay claim', 'Dunn Construction DOT project overrun'],
    outreach_angle: 'SmartPM Essentials entry point. BIR on DOT bid packages. Low-cost entry for regional player.'
  },

  // ── SEGMENT 2: NON-VERTICALLY INTEGRATED OWNERS ──────────────────────────
  {
    company: 'NV Energy (Berkshire Hathaway Energy)',
    segment: 'Owner — Utility',
    vertical: 'Power / Transmission',
    revenue_est: 'Subsidiary — large',
    hq: 'Las Vegas, NV',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Transmission expansion program. Owner-side controls dependent on contractor reporting. No independent schedule analytics capability.',
    project_range: '$150-400M',
    contact_title: 'Director of Capital Projects / Project Controls',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['NV Energy transmission project delay', 'NV Energy capital project controls', 'NV Energy contractor claim'],
    outreach_angle: 'Direct TDI/CHPE analog. Transmission owner with no independent controls. BIR + SmartPM Owner module.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Avangrid Renewables',
    segment: 'Owner — Renewable Energy',
    vertical: 'Offshore Wind / Transmission',
    revenue_est: '$2B+ parent',
    hq: 'Portland, ME',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Vineyard Wind and other offshore projects experiencing significant schedule delays. Owner-side controls gap documented publicly.',
    project_range: '$200-500M+',
    contact_title: 'VP Project Controls / Director of Construction',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Avangrid offshore wind delay 2024 2025', 'Avangrid project controls gap', 'Avangrid Vineyard Wind schedule'],
    outreach_angle: 'Offshore wind + transmission. Ørsted connection as warm intro path. Owner intelligence gap is the exact problem.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Pattern Energy',
    segment: 'Owner — Renewable Energy',
    vertical: 'Wind / Solar / Transmission',
    revenue_est: '$1B+ (CPP Investments backed)',
    hq: 'San Francisco, CA',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'SunZia transmission project — largest wind energy project in US history. Complex multi-contractor delivery. Owner-side controls critical.',
    project_range: '$100-300M per phase',
    contact_title: 'VP Construction / Project Controls Director',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Pattern Energy SunZia delay 2025', 'Pattern Energy project controls', 'SunZia transmission schedule'],
    outreach_angle: 'SunZia is the CHPE equivalent in the Southwest. Owner-side IMS + SmartPM is the exact capability gap.'
  },

  // ── SEGMENT 3: REGIONAL TRANSIT / WATER AUTHORITIES ─────────────────────
  {
    company: 'Sound Transit (Seattle)',
    segment: 'Public Owner — Transit',
    vertical: 'Rail / Transit Infrastructure',
    revenue_est: 'Public agency — $54B program',
    hq: 'Seattle, WA',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'LOSS',
    signal_detail: 'Documented cost overruns exceeding $12B on light rail extensions. Schedule slippage publicly reported. Board-level scrutiny.',
    project_range: '$200-800M per contract',
    contact_title: 'Director of Project Controls / Capital Programs',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Sound Transit cost overrun 2024 2025', 'Sound Transit schedule delay project controls', 'Sound Transit contractor claim'],
    outreach_angle: 'FedRAMP authorized SmartPM fits public agency procurement. Documented losses create urgency. BIR on active bid packages.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Denver Water',
    segment: 'Public Owner — Water Utility',
    vertical: 'Water Infrastructure',
    revenue_est: 'Public utility — $2B+ capital program',
    hq: 'Denver, CO',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Gross Reservoir expansion project experienced significant delays and cost increases. Owner-side controls gap.',
    project_range: '$100-300M',
    contact_title: 'Capital Projects Director / Project Controls Manager',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'MEDIUM',
    search_keywords: ['Denver Water Gross Reservoir delay overrun', 'Denver Water project controls capital program'],
    outreach_angle: 'Water utility owner with documented project loss. SmartPM Owner module + BIR on next bid cycle.'
  },

  // ── SEGMENT 4: SMALL CONSULTING COMPANIES (OPM/CM) ───────────────────────
  {
    company: 'ARCADIS — Project Controls Division (mid-market)',
    segment: 'Small-Mid Consulting',
    vertical: 'Program Management / Owner Rep',
    revenue_est: 'Parent large — target division is mid-market',
    hq: 'Global / US offices',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Consulting firm competing on owner-rep engagements. Technology differentiation is a procurement win factor.',
    project_range: '$100-300M client projects',
    contact_title: 'Practice Lead — Project Controls',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Arcadis project controls SmartPM', 'Arcadis schedule analytics construction'],
    outreach_angle: 'Co-referral model. They bring the relationship, you and SmartPM bring the AI analytics stack. Sub-consulting angle.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Cumming Group',
    segment: 'Small-Mid Consulting',
    vertical: 'Owner Rep / Program Management',
    revenue_est: '$200-400M',
    hq: 'Atlanta, GA',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Growing OPM firm. Competes on relationships but lacks technology-enabled schedule controls differentiation.',
    project_range: '$100-300M client projects',
    contact_title: 'Regional Director / VP Project Controls',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['Cumming Group project controls technology', 'Cumming Group SmartPM schedule analytics'],
    outreach_angle: 'SmartPM as competitive differentiator in their proposals. You become their technology enablement partner.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Kitchell Corporation',
    segment: 'Small-Mid GC / CM',
    vertical: 'Healthcare / Education / Institutional',
    revenue_est: '$500-800M',
    hq: 'Phoenix, AZ',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'DELAY',
    signal_detail: 'Complex institutional projects with LD exposure. Healthcare and education construction has aggressive penalty clauses.',
    project_range: '$100-250M',
    contact_title: 'Director of Scheduling / VP Operations',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'MEDIUM',
    search_keywords: ['Kitchell Corporation schedule delay', 'Kitchell project controls healthcare construction'],
    outreach_angle: 'Institutional owner market — LD exposure on hospital and school projects. SmartPM continuous monitoring.'
  },

  {
    company: 'Solo OPM Practitioners — LinkedIn Sourced',
    segment: 'Solo Consulting',
    vertical: 'All',
    revenue_est: '$500K-$2M annual',
    hq: 'Various',
    vertically_integrated: false,
    signal: 'NONE — proactive play',
    signal_detail: 'Senior OPMs (20+ yrs exp) running solo practices. Need SmartPM to compete against larger CM firms. Cannot access enterprise licensing directly.',
    project_range: '$100-300M client projects',
    contact_title: 'Principal / Owner',
    smartpm_fit: 'HIGH',
    bir_fit: 'HIGH',
    search_keywords: ['independent owner representative construction LinkedIn', 'solo project controls consultant LinkedIn', 'OPM consultant independent'],
    outreach_angle: 'Peer-to-peer. You are them. SmartPM Essentials through your partner agreement. Offer sub-consulting on BIR engagements.'
  }

];

const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });

return prospects.map(p => ({ json: { ...p, generated_date: today } }));

nodes.name: SEC EDGAR — Search Financial Filings
nodes.notes: Free SEC full-text search API — no key needed. Searches for project loss disclosures in 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K filings.

values.content:
=You are the business development intelligence assistant for Michael Craig at Exsto Cura Consilium.

Michael is a Senior Principal project controls consultant and authorized SmartPM referral partner.
His specialization: HVDC transmission, offshore wind, energy infrastructure, AI-enabled project controls.
Key offerings: BIR™ (Bid Schedule Intelligence Review), TRIAGE-IMPACT™ TIA framework, SmartPM deployment, ALICE simulation.
Proof of concept: CO-015 on CHPE settled $27M — the parallel tracks gap between schedule forensics and commercial claims.

Analyze this prospect and write a targeted intelligence brief.

COMPANY: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.company }}
SEGMENT: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.segment }}
VERTICAL: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.vertical }}
SIGNAL TYPE: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.signal }}
SIGNAL DETAIL: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.signal_detail }}
SMARTPM FIT: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.smartpm_fit }}
BIR FIT: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.bir_fit }}
OUTREACH ANGLE: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.outreach_angle }}
PROJECT RANGE: {{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.project_range }}

RECENT NEWS:
{{ JSON.stringify($('News API — Scan for Signals').first().json.articles?.slice(0,3).map(a => ({ title: a.title, date: a.publishedAt, source: a.source?.name, snippet: a.description })), null, 2) }}

SEC FILING SIGNALS:
{{ JSON.stringify($('SEC EDGAR — Search Financial Filings').first().json?.hits?.hits?.slice(0,3).map(h => ({ filing: h._source?.period_of_report, form: h._source?.form_type, snippet: h._source?.file_date })), null, 2) }}

Write a crisp intelligence brief with these exact sections:

## SITUATION
2-3 sentences. What is happening with this company right now based on news and signals.

## PAIN SIGNAL
1-2 sentences. Specific evidence of the schedule/commercial problem SmartPM solves.

## MICHAEL'S ANGLE
2-3 sentences. Why reach out NOW. What specific capability closes their gap.

## OUTREACH MESSAGE (LinkedIn or Email)
Write a 5-7 sentence message in Michael's voice:
- Reference specific company situation or recent news
- Mention CHPE/HVDC experience as credibility anchor
- Position SmartPM as the solution (not a tool pitch — a capability offer)
- Include BIR as low-risk entry point where fit is HIGH
- Do NOT mention dollar amounts or pricing
- End with a specific question that invites a reply

## RECOMMENDED ACTION
One clear next step. Specific.

## PRIORITY SCORE
Rate 1-10 based on: signal strength, SmartPM fit, BIR fit, relationship potential, timing.

parameters.title: ={{ $('Load Prospect Database').first().json.company }} — SmartPM Intel {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString() }}
